question:
A shipper's certification is best described as _____.

1) a paper certification given to the manufacturer from the shipper
2) a paper certification from the manufacturer given to the shipper
3) a certification that the package has been prepared according to the rules when the shipper packages hazardous materials
4) a test for shippers that certifies that they are qualified to package hazardous materials
canonical_answer: a certification that the package has been prepared according to the rules when the shipper packages hazardous materials

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: a certification that the package has been prepared according to the rules when the shipper packages hazardous materials

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: a certification that the package has been prepared according to the rules when the shipper packages hazardous materials

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: a certification that the package has been prepared according to the rules when the shipper packages hazardous materials

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: a certification that the package has been prepared according to the rules when the shipper packages hazardous materials

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: a certification that the package has been prepared according to the rules when the shipper packages hazardous materials
